Section 1
def count_words(text, word):
    clean_text = text.lower()
    clean_word = word.lower()
    return clean_text.count(clean_word)

Section 2
This code converts both inputs to lowercase.
Then it uses the count method.
The result is an integer value.

Section 3
Input strings are normalized for comparison.
Punctuation remains attached to words here.
Exact matches are tallied by the tool.
